case_title: RICHARD SHARNAK RESPONDENT VS. KAISER PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT KAISER PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP AS TO RESPONDENT SHARNAK, RICHARD HEARING SET FOR JAN-17-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 818547
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-17-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

JUDGE PRO TEM NANCY J. NEWMAN, CLERK-BETH WILBER: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-07 BY JUDGE PRO TEM NANCY J. NEWMAN. JUDGE NEWMAN TO ISSUE JUDGMENT AFTER SHE RECEIVES RESPONDENT'S TRIAL BRIEF ON JAN-24-07
KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITAL'S TRIAL BRIEF & MOTION TO STRIKE DAMAGES IN EXCESS OF $250.00, LODGED DIRECTLY WITH JUDGE PRO TEM NANCY J. NEWMAN, AND SUBSEQUENTLY PLACED IN THE FILE BY THE CLERK.
PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION OF DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE DAMAGES; LODGED DIRECTLY WITH JUDGE PRO TEM NANCY J. NEWMAN, AND SUBSEQUENTLY PLACED IN THE FILE BY THE CLERK.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SHARNAK, RICHARD RECOVER FROM APPELLANT KAISER PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP $3,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,350.00, AND ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT/APPELLANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE; SEE SCANNED DOC FOR DETAILS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-02-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nancy J. Newman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:20am
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Richard Sharnak appears in Pro Per as appellant; Jason J. Curliano, Esq. appears for respondent Kaiser Permanente Medical Group.
Parties and witnesses were previously sworn. Mr. Sharnak testifies in the narrative. William Sharnak, son of Richard Sharnak, testifies as a witness.
EXHA(R) Signed waiver re belongings
Mr. Cruliano then presents his case for Kaiser Permanente. Fiona Cunningham testifies on behalf of Kaiser Permanente Medical Group.
Mr. Sharnak asks to be allowed to submit a brief. The Court agrees and Mr. Sharnak is to lodge a trial brief, with a certificate of service, directly with Judge Newman at her office address, by Jan -24-07. Mr. Cruliano can respond with a one page brief if he feels it is necessary after reading Mr. Sharnak's brief.
9:55am
Matter is submitted, new evidence is not retained. Judge Newman takes the judgment form with her, the clerk retains the file. Judge Newman will send the clerk the completed judgment.
